seoTitle: Mount Magnificent vs Mount Mcintyre — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Magnificent and Mount Mcintyre. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Magnificent vs Mount Mcintyre: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Magnificent and Mount Mcintyre.
heading: Mount Magnificent vs Mount Mcintyre — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Magnificent, South Australia and Mount Mcintyre, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Magnificent has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Mount Mcintyre (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Magnificent or Mount Mcintyre safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Magnificent has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Mount Mcintyre scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Magnificent scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Mcintyre scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Magnificent or Mount Mcintyre?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Magnificent has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
